---
title: "01 · Ingest & connect data"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

> Phase 1 — tutorial style, step by step. Governance:
> `.claude/policies/analysis/data-onboarding.md`, `data-integrity.md`,
> `data-protection.md`.

Onboard the data **without leaving anything floating**. Light data → copy into
`data/raw/` (committed). Heavy / private / external → **connect, don't import**
via `config.yml` (see `../config.example.yml`); the project stays portable.
Record provenance (source, date, checksum) in `../metadata/`. Never edit raw in
place — every change is code downstream.

```{r}
#| label: connect
# Read locations from config (portable); resolve internal paths with {here}.
cfg <- yaml::read_yaml(here::here("config.yml"))
raw <- rio::import(cfg$data_sources$example_dataset$path)   # rio opens anything
```
